{info:title=Источник}
Сгенерировано из: {{docs/nautilus/npp-v1-1/README.md}}
Дата: 2026-04-29
{info}

h1. npp-v1-1

_Файлов:_ 23

h2. Содержание

* [00-abstract-status.md|00-abstract-status.md] — 
* [01-introduction.md|01-introduction.md] — 
* [02-terminology.md|02-terminology.md] — 
* [03-registry.md|03-registry.md] — > [!IMPORTANT]
* [04-passport.md|04-passport.md] — 
* [05-compatibility-levels.md|05-compatibility-levels.md] — 
* [06-adapter-interface.md|06-adapter-interface.md] — > [!IMPORTANT]
* [07-portal-entry.md|07-portal-entry.md] — > [!IMPORTANT]
* [08-q6-space.md|08-q6-space.md] — > [!IMPORTANT]
* [09-consensus-algorithm.md|09-consensus-algorithm.md] — 
* [10-query-flow.md|10-query-flow.md] — 
* [11-relevance-ranking.md|11-relevance-ranking.md] — 
* [12-onboarding-paths.md|12-onboarding-paths.md] — 
* [13-rest-api.md|13-rest-api.md] — > [!IMPORTANT]
* [14-sdk.md|14-sdk.md] — 
* [15-security.md|15-security.md] — 
* [16-mcp-extension.md|16-mcp-extension.md] — 
* [17-versioning-policy.md|17-versioning-policy.md] — > [!IMPORTANT]
* [18-reference-implementation.md|18-reference-implementation.md] — 
* [19-adr-001-federation-over-merging.md|19-adr-001-federation-over-merging.md] — 
* [20-adr-002-q6-first-class.md|20-adr-002-q6-first-class.md] — 
* [21-adr-003-five-onboarding-paths.md|21-adr-003-five-onboarding-paths.md] — 
* [22-glossary.md|22-glossary.md] — 



----

_Похожие документы:_
* [README|docs/nautilus/npp-v1-0/README.md] (сходство 0.60)
* [103-appendix-b-change-log|docs/02-anthropic-vacancies/103-appendix-b-change-log.md] (сходство 0.15)
* [21-adr-003-five-onboarding-paths|docs/nautilus/npp-v1-1/21-adr-003-five-onboarding-paths.md] (сходство 0.15)
